'arn:[-.a-z0-9]{1,63}:[-.a-z0-9]{1,63}:[-.a-z0-9]{0,63}:[-.a-z0-9]{0,63}:[^/].{0,1023}', ], 'ResourceDescription' => [ 'type' => 'string', 'max' => 256, 'min' => 1, ], 'ResourceId' => [ 'type' =>
